name: What if the AI referral was partially my fault in Chicago?
description: Partial fault reduces but doesn't eliminate claim in IL.

mainEntity.name: What if the AI referral was partially my fault in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Partial fault reduces but doesn't eliminate claim in IL.
acceptedAnswer.description: Comparative fault may reduce recovery but not bar it if firm primarily negligent. Illinois applies modified comparative negligence. Key factors: (1) Your actions vs. firm's duty; (2) AI oversight failure; (3) Proportional fault allocation. Disclose honestly to your new lawyer. Courts weigh attorney standards higher.
